name: anchor-x402
description: Sixteen x402-paid services for AI agents — pay-per-call in USDC on Base or Solana mainnet, no accounts, no API keys. Skills: dual-chain hash anchoring, OFAC sanctions screening, signed decision attestation, mainnet tx + EVM calldata decode, ENS/SNS resolution, USD spot price, freeform datetime parsing, bundled wallet intelligence, async wallet due-diligence investigator ($1.77, signed + dual-chain-anchored report), plus universal LLM endpoints — roast, oracle (anchored verdict), TL;DR, aura, grade. Hosted chatbot at chat.anchor-x402.com; MCP server published as anchor-x402-mcp.
